<!-- generated by website/scripts/gen-api-docs.mjs; do not edit -->

Create an append-log tier over a Node filesystem backend (D106 passive storage).

## Import

```ts
import { fileAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Signature

```ts
function fileAppendLog(
	dir: string,
	opts: FileAppendLogOptions<T> = {},
): AppendLogStorageTier<T>
```

## Parameters

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `dir` | `string` | dir value used by the helper. |
| `opts` | `FileAppendLogOptions<T>` | Options that configure the helper. |

## Returns

A `AppendLogStorageTier<T>` value.

## Example

```ts
import { fileAppendLog } from "@graphrefly/ts/storage/node";
```

## Source

`packages/ts/src/storage/node.ts`
